title: LED GLS Light Bulb E27 Edison Screw, 15W (100W Equivalent), 1521 Lumens, 6500K Bright Daylight, Large ES Cap Energy Saving A60 Standard Ceiling Lighting Bulb, Non-Dimmable, Pack of 2
features: 🌟【𝐏𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐮𝐥 𝐁𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬】 Experience 1521 lumens of high-output Daylight bulb (6500K) — the perfect balance of brightness and comfort for everyday use. This 15W LED replaces traditional 100W equivalent bulbs while saving up to 85% on energy costs, making it ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, hallways and more.

🌟【𝐅𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐤𝐞𝐫-𝐅𝐫𝐞𝐞 & 𝐄𝐲𝐞-𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐭 𝐋𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠】 Enjoy stable, flicker-free light without harsh glare, reducing eye strain during reading, work or relaxation. A high color rendering index (CRI > 80) provides natural and vivid colour accuracy that enhances interior ambience.

🌟【𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 & 𝐖𝐢𝐝𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲】 Standard E27 edison screw and GLS A60 shape fits most UK fixtures effortlessly — from ceiling lights and pendants to table lamps and wall fittings. Non-dimmable design ensures smooth, consistent light output in any 220–240V household setup.

🌟【𝐄𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐠𝐲 𝐄𝐟𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭 & 𝐂𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐒𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐠】 Designed for superior performance with low energy consumption, this LED bulb uses significantly less power than old-style bulbs. The ErP energy rating ensures it meets strict efficiency standards, helping lower your electricity bill and reduce carbon footprint.

🌟【𝐑𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 & 𝐋𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐋𝐢𝐟𝐞】 ROBENZA LED bulbs are CE, UKCA & ErP certified for trusted performance. Built with premium materials and advanced LED technology, these bulbs deliver up to 20,000 hours of dependable illumination, reducing the need for frequent replacements. We offer a 36-Month Hassle-Free Replacement Warranty. Our customer support team is available 365 days a year to assist you.
description: Upgrade your home lighting with the Robenza Non-Dimmable E27 LED Bulb, designed to deliver warm, eye comfortable illumination with high energy efficiency. Consuming just 15W while replacing a 100W traditional bulb, it produces 1521 lumens of instant brightness with no flicker or warm-up time. The 6500K Daylight bulb creates a cosy, welcoming atmosphere, ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, hallways and bathrooms. Featuring smooth dimming compatibility, you can easily adjust the light to suit any mood or activity. Built for durability and everyday use, this bulb fits standard E27 Edison Screw fittings and complies with CE, UKCA, and ErP standards. Each pack of long-lasting LED bulbs is backed by a 36-month replacement guarantee and year-round customer support. 𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐬: 15W LED replaces traditional 100W bulbs Bright 1521 lumens with instant full light output Daylight 6500K colour for a cosy ambience Smooth dimming performance with compatible dimmers Standard E27 Edison Screw fitting No flicker, no buzzing, no warm-up time Energy-efficient and environmentally friendly Suitable for multiple rooms and ceiling fixtures CE, UKCA & ErP compliant for safety and efficiency 36-month replacement guarantee

specifications_table.Special Features: 20000 Hours Long Life, 3-Year Warranty, Bright & Eye Comfortable Light, Easy Installation, Energy Efficient, Flicker-Free, Instant On
